allow: Bash(make clean && make 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(make 2>&1 | tail -40)
Bash(make test 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'echo hello\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "---"; printf 'case foo in foo\) echo match;; esac\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "---"; printf 'x=$\(echo hi\)\\necho $x\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "---"; printf 'i=1\\nuntil [ $i -gt 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -iE 'error|warning' | head -30; echo "=== BUILD STATUS ==="; printf 'x=hello\\necho $x\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "---"; printf 'i=0\\nuntil [ $i -ge 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "---"; printf 'case bar in foo\) echo f;; *\) echo other;; esac\\n' | ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'case foo in foo\) echo match;; *\) echo other;; esac\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'echo $\(echo hi\)\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'echo $\(\(2+3*4\)\)\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'x=hello\\necho $x\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\nuntil [ $i -ge 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'until false; do echo hi; done\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\necho $i\\n[ $i -ge 3 ]\\necho $?\\n' | ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'while true; do echo hi; break; done\\n' | ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(kill 5336 2>/dev/null; printf 'i=0\\nuntil [ $i -ge 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'i=0\\n[ $i -ge 3 ]\\necho $?\\n[ $i -lt 3 ]\\necho $?\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\nwhile [ $i -lt 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "=== BUILD ==="; printf 'i=0\\nuntil [ $i -ge 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf '[ 3 -ge 3 ]; echo $?\\n[ 2 -ge 3 ]; echo $?\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'i=0\\n[ $i -ge 3 ]\\necho $?\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'echo $\(\(0\)\)\\necho $\(\(0+1\)\)\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\ni=$\(\(i+1\)\)\\necho $i\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'i=0\\nwhile [ $i -lt 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\nuntil [ $i -ge 3 ]; do echo iter; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'until true; do echo never; done\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "=== BUILD ==="; printf 'i=0\\nwhile [ $i -lt 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\nuntil [ $i -ge 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'if [ 1 -eq 1 ]; then echo yes; else echo no; fi\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -iE 'error|warning' | grep -v 'write.*unused_result\\|getcwd.*unused_result\\|format-truncation\\|maybe-uninitialized'; echo "=== BUILD ==="; make test 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'greet\(\) { echo hello $1; }\\ngreet world\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'x=42\\ncat <<EOF\\nvalue is $x\\nEOF\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'cat <<"EOF"\\nvalue is $x\\nEOF\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'for i in a b c; do echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "=== BUILD ==="; printf 'x=42\\ncat <<EOF\\nvalue is $x\\nEOF\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'cat <<"EOF"\\nno expand $x\\nEOF\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'greet\(\) { echo hello $1; }\\ngreet world\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make test 2>&1; echo "=========="; printf 'greet\(\) { echo hello $1; }\\ngreet world\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'for i in apple banana cherry; do echo fruit: $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'if [ 2 -gt 1 ]; then echo yes; elif [ 2 -lt 1 ]; then echo no; fi\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "=== BUILD ==="; printf 'greet\(\) { echo hello $1; }\\ngreet world\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'count\(\) { echo $# args; }\\ncount a b c\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; make test 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "=== BUILD ==="; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i = 3 ]; then break; fi; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i = 3 ]; then continue; fi; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; make test 2>&1 | grep -E 'Test|hello|/tmp|/root|test|yes|no|first|second|Done')

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "=== BUILD ==="; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i = 3 ]; then continue; fi; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'i=0\\nwhile [ $i -lt 5 ]; do i=$\(\(i+1\)\); if [ $i = 3 ]; then continue; fi; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "==="; printf 'type break\\nfor i in 1 2 3; do break; echo $i; done\\necho after\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do echo before-$i; if [ $i = 3 ]; then break; fi; echo after-$i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -i error; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i = 3 ]; then break; fi; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do if [ $i = 3 ]; then continue; fi; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(make clean && make 2>&1 | grep -i warning | grep -v 'write.*unused_result\\|getcwd.*unused_result\\|format-truncation\\|stringop-truncation'; echo "=== Total warnings: $\(make 2>&1 | grep -ci warning\) ===")
Bash(make 2>&1 | grep -ic warning; echo "---"; make 2>&1 | grep -i warning | head -5)

Bash(make test 2>&1; echo "======== COMPREHENSIVE TESTS ========"; printf 'echo "=== case ==="; case x in x\) echo match;; *\) echo nomatch;; esac; echo "=== cmdsub ==="; echo $\(echo nested\); echo "=== arith ==="; echo $\(\(10/2+1\)\); echo "=== assign ==="; x=hi; echo $x; echo "=== until ==="; i=0; until [ $i -ge 2 ]; do echo $i; i=$\(\(i+1\)\); done; echo "=== func ==="; f\(\) { echo $1 $#; }; f a b c; echo "=== heredoc ==="; cat <<HD\\nline $\(\(1+1\)\)\\nHD; echo "=== break ==="; for i in 1 2 3 4; do [ $i = 2 ] && break; echo $i; done; echo "=== continue ==="; for i in 1 2 3 4; do [ $i = 2 ] && continue; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 10 ./besh 2>&1)

Bash(printf 'cat <<HD\\nline $\(\(1+1\)\)\\nvalue $x\\nHD\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4; do [ $i = 2 ] && break; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "==="; printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4; do [ $i = 2 ] && continue; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(make 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(printf 'cat <<HD\\nline $\(\(1+1\)\)\\nvalue $x\\nHD\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'cat <<HD\\nline $\(\(1+1\)\)\\nvalue $x\\nHD\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "---EXIT:$?")
Bash(printf 'cat <<HD\\nhello\\nHD\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===EXIT:$?")
Bash(printf 'cat <<HD\\nline $\(\(1+1\)\)\\nvalue $x\\nHD\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'echo hello\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'echo hello; echo done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'echo a; echo b; echo c\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'echo a\\necho b\\necho c\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(make clean && make 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(make 2>&1 | tail -3 && printf 'echo hello\\necho done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4; do [ $i = 2 ] && break; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'for i in 1 2 3 4; do [ $i = 2 ] && continue; echo $i; done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'x=0\\nwhile [ $x -lt 3 ]; do echo $x; x=$\(\(x+1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'x=5\\nwhile [ $x -gt 0 ]; do echo $x; x=$\(\(x-1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhi\) echo "matched hi";;\\nhello\) echo "matched hello";;\\n*\) echo "default";;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'x=3\\nuntil [ $x -eq 0 ]; do echo $x; x=$\(\(x-1\)\); done\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhi\) echo "matched hi";;\\nhello\) echo "matched hello";;\\n*\) echo "default";;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'x=hello\\ncase $x in\\nhello\) echo yes;;\\n*\) echo no;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhi\) echo "matched hi";;\\nhello\) echo "matched hello";;\\n*\) echo "default";;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "---")
Bash(printf 'x=5\\nif [ $x -eq 5 ]; then echo five; elif [ $x -eq 6 ]; then echo six; else echo other; fi\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'greet\(\) { echo "hello $1"; }\\ngreet world\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'x=hello\\ncase $x in\\nhello\) echo yes;;\\n*\) echo no;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\necho $word\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhello\) echo matched;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhi\) echo one;;\\nhello\) echo two;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nxxx\) echo one;;\\nhello\) echo two;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhi\) echo one;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhello\) echo two;;\\nxxx\) echo one;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
Bash(make 2>&1 | tail -3 && printf 'word="hello"\\ncase "$word" in\\nhi\) echo one;;\\nhello\) echo two;;\\n*\) echo default;;\\nesac\\n' | timeout 5 ./besh 2>&1; echo "===")
